_comment: Signal quality / suppression detection rules. Source: AGENT2_SPEC_TEIL3 Section 8

suppression_checks.name: VIX suppressed by dealer gamma
suppression_checks.reason: VIX suppressed by dealer gamma, not true calm

suppression_checks.name: HY spreads tight but financial stress rising
suppression_checks.reason: HY spreads tight but financial stress rising elsewhere
suppression_checks.true_risk: Credit stress may be building under surface

suppression_checks.name: Breadth looks healthy but internals deteriorating
suppression_checks.reason: Breadth looks healthy but new highs collapsing

data_freshness._note: If field confidence < 0.5, sub-score is halved (integer division)

degraded_threshold._note: Layer is DEGRADED if >30% fields stale OR >1 anomaly
